subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Recognise shades of meaning among near synonyms

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: A synonym is a word that nearly has the same meaning as another word and can replace it in a sentence without changing the meaning.

sections.heading: Shades of Meaning
sections.content: The note distinguishes odour, scent, smell, stench, aroma, and fragrance, and provides additional synonym pairs such as confess/admit, abandon/give up, dangerous/risky, surrender/yield, and famous/renowned.
